Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms

Class VariableTable

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms.VariableTable
Direct Known Subclasses:
TestClauseBuilder.MyVariableTable, TestSameObjects.MyVariableTable
public class VariableTable extends Object
Used by the loader to retrieve the instances of the variables, local variables and constants corresponding to the given index or name.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Constant
    getConstant(String name, Sort sort)
    Returns the constant corresponding to the given name or a new constant if none has been created yet.
    IntegerConstant
    getInteger(BigInteger value)
    Returns the integer constant corresponding to the given name or a new constant if none has been created yet.
    LocalVariable
    getLocalVariable(int index, boolean isForall, Sort sort)
    Returns the local variable corresponding to the given index or creates a new one.
    Variable
    getVariable(int index, Sort sort)
    Returns the variable corresponding to the given index or creates a new one.

  • Method Details

    • getVariable

      public Variable getVariable(int index, Sort sort)
      Returns the variable corresponding to the given index or creates a new one.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the variable
      sort - the sort of the variable
      Returns:
      the variable corresponding to the given index or a new one if the variable does not exist yet

    • getLocalVariable

      public LocalVariable getLocalVariable(int index, boolean isForall, Sort sort)
      Returns the local variable corresponding to the given index or creates a new one.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the variable
      sort - the sort of the variable
      isForall - the forall flag
      Returns:
      the local variable corresponding to the given index or a new one if the variable does not exist yet

    • getConstant

      public Constant getConstant(String name, Sort sort)
      Returns the constant corresponding to the given name or a new constant if none has been created yet.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the constant
      sort - the sort of the constant
      Returns:
      the constant corresponding to the given name or a new one if none has been created yet

    • getInteger

      public IntegerConstant getInteger(BigInteger value)
      Returns the integer constant corresponding to the given name or a new constant if none has been created yet.
      Parameters:
      value - the value of the constant
      Returns:
      the constant corresponding to the given name or a new one if none has been created yet
